content.content:
1	version: '3.8'
2	
3	services:
4	  # ============================================================
5	  # MySQL 8.0 - Relational data store
6	  # ============================================================
7	  mysql:
8	    image: mysql:8.0
9	    container_name: ica-mysql
10	    restart: unless-stopped
11	    ports:
12	      - "3306:3306"
13	    environment:
14	      MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD: ${MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD:-root123}
15	      MYSQL_DATABASE: ${MYSQL_DATABASE:-coding_assistant}
16	    volumes:
17	      - mysql-data:/var/lib/mysql
18	      - ./docker/mysql/init.sql:/docker-entrypoint-initdb.d/01-init.sql:ro
19	    command: >
20	      --character-set-server=utf8mb4
21	      --collation-server=utf8mb4_unicode_ci
22	      --default-authentication-plugin=mysql_native_password
23	      --max_connections=200
24	      --innodb_buffer_pool_size=256M
25	    healthcheck:
26	      test: ["CMD", "mysqladmin", "ping", "-h", "localhost", "-u", "root", "-p${MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD:-root123}"]
27	      interval: 10s
28	      timeout: 5s
29	      retries: 10
30	      start_period: 30s
31	    networks:
32	      - ica-network
33	
34	  # ============================================================
35	  # Neo4j 5 - Knowledge graph store
36	  # ============================================================
37	  neo4j:
38	    image: neo4j:5
39	    container_name: ica-neo4j
40	    restart: unless-stopped
41	    ports:
42	      - "7474:7474"   # HTTP browser
43	      - "7687:7687"   # Bolt protocol
44	    environment:
45	      NEO4J_AUTH: ${NEO4J_USER:-neo4j}/${NEO4J_PASSWORD:-neo4j123}
46	      NEO4J_PLUGINS: '["apoc"]'
47	      NEO4J_server_memory_heap_initial__size: 256m
48	      NEO4J_server_memory_heap_max__size: 512m
49	    volumes:
50	      - neo4j-data:/data
51	      - neo4j-logs:/logs
52	      - ./docker/neo4j/init-data.cypher:/var/lib/neo4j/import/init-data.cypher:ro
53	    healthcheck:
54	      test: ["CMD-SHELL", "wget --no-verbose --tries=1 --spider http://localhost:7474 || exit 1"]
55	      interval: 10s
56	      timeout: 5s
57	      retries: 10
58	      start_period: 30s
59	    networks:
60	      - ica-network
61	
62	  # ============================================================
63	  # Backend - Spring Boot application
64	  # ============================================================
65	  backend:
66	    build:
67	      context: ./backend
68	      dockerfile: Dockerfile
69	    container_name: ica-backend
70	    restart: unless-stopped
71	    expose:
72	      - "8080"
73	    environment:
74	      # MySQL
75	      SPRING_DATASOURCE_URL: jdbc:mysql://mysql:3306/${MYSQL_DATABASE:-coding_assistant}?useUnicode=true&characterEncoding=utf8mb4&useSSL=false&serverTimezone=Asia/Shanghai&allowPublicKeyRetrieval=true
76	      SPRING_DATASOURCE_USERNAME: root
77	      SPRING_DATASOURCE_PASSWORD: ${MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD:-root123}
78	
79	      # Neo4j
80	      SPRING_NEO4J_URI: bolt://neo4j:7687
81	      SPRING_NEO4J_AUTHENTICATION_USERNAME: ${NEO4J_USER:-neo4j}
82	      SPRING_NEO4J_AUTHENTICATION_PASSWORD: ${NEO4J_PASSWORD:-neo4j123}
83	
84	      # JWT
85	      JWT_SECRET: ${JWT_SECRET:-mySecretKeyForJWTTokenGenerationThatIsLongEnough2024}
86	
87	      # LLM
88	      LLM_PROVIDER: ${LLM_PROVIDER:-openai}
89	      OPENAI_API_KEY: ${OPENAI_API_KEY:-your-api-key-here}
90	      OPENAI_MODEL: ${OPENAI_MODEL:-gpt-4}
91	
92	      # Spring profile
93	      SPRING_PROFILES_ACTIVE: docker
94	
95	      # JVM tuning
96	      JAVA_OPTS: "-Xms256m -Xmx512m"
97	    depends_on:
98	      mysql:
99	        condition: service_healthy
100	      neo4j:
101	        condition: service_healthy
102	    networks:
103	      - ica-network
104	
105	  # ============================================================
106	  # Nginx - Serves frontend static files & reverse-proxies API
107	  # ============================================================
108	  nginx:
109	    image: nginx:alpine
110	    container_name: ica-nginx
111	    restart: unless-stopped
112	    ports:
113	      - "80:80"
114	    volumes:
115	      - ./docker/nginx/nginx.conf:/etc/nginx/conf.d/default.conf:ro
116	      - frontend-dist:/usr/share/nginx/html:ro
117	    depends_on:
118	      - backend
119	      - frontend
120	    networks:
121	      - ica-network
122	
123	  # ============================================================
124	  # Frontend - Vue 3 build stage (outputs to shared volume)
125	  # ============================================================
126	  frontend:
127	    build:
128	      context: ./frontend
129	      dockerfile: Dockerfile
130	    container_name: ica-frontend-build
131	    volumes:
132	      - frontend-dist:/app/dist
133	    # This container builds and exits; nginx serves the output
134	    command: ["sh", "-c", "cp -r /build-output/* /app/dist/ 2>/dev/null || true"]
135	
136	volumes:
137	  mysql-data:
138	    driver: local
139	  neo4j-data:
140	    driver: local
141	  neo4j-logs:
142	    driver: local
143	  frontend-dist:
144	    driver: local
145	
146	networks:
147	  ica-network:
148	    driver: bridge
